GGCAL.Title: GG Calendar
GGCAL.Settings.Preset.Name: Active calendar
GGCAL.Settings.Preset.Hint: Choose a built-in calendar or select Custom to use your own JSON definition.
GGCAL.Settings.CustomConfig.Name: Custom calendar (JSON)
GGCAL.Settings.CustomConfig.Hint: Used only when the active calendar is set to Custom. Define months (with optional intercalary festivals and leapDays), weekdays, leap rule, epoch and seasons.
GGCAL.Settings.Climate.Name: World climate
GGCAL.Settings.Climate.Hint: Drives the dynamic weather generator together with the current season.
GGCAL.Settings.AutoWeather.Name: Automatic daily weather
GGCAL.Settings.AutoWeather.Hint: Roll new weather to chat each time the in-game day changes.
GGCAL.Settings.TempUnit.Name: Temperature unit
GGCAL.Settings.RestAdvance.Name: Advance time on D&D 5e rests
GGCAL.Settings.RestAdvance.Hint: Short rest advances 1 hour, long rest advances 8 hours when a rest completes.
GGCAL.Settings.CombatAdvance.Name: Advance time on combat rounds
GGCAL.Settings.CombatAdvance.Hint: Only for game systems that don't already advance world time per round (D&D 5e already does — keep this off there).
GGCAL.Settings.SecondsPerRound.Name: Seconds per combat round
GGCAL.Notes.Title: Notes
GGCAL.Notes.TitlePh: Festival of the Moon, caravan arrives...
GGCAL.SetDate.Title: Set world date & time
GGCAL.Errors.GMOnly: Only the GM can change the world time.
GGCAL.Errors.BadCustomJSON: GG Calendar: your custom calendar JSON is invalid. Falling back to Gregorian.
GGCAL.Journal.Name: GG Calendar — Campaign Chronicle
GGCAL.Settings.WorldCalendar.Name: Register as world calendar
GGCAL.Settings.WorldCalendar.Hint: On Foundry v13+, make GG Calendar the canonical world calendar so other modules read its date and format. Requires reload. No effect on v12.
GGCAL.Settings.SCBridge.Name: Simple Calendar compatibility
GGCAL.Settings.SCBridge.Hint: Expose a Simple Calendar-compatible API so modules that depend on Simple Calendar keep working. Only active when Simple Calendar itself is not installed. Requires reload.
GGCAL.Chronicle.Title: Campaign Chronicle
GGCAL.Chronicle.ClearConfirm: Delete all recorded events? This cannot be undone.
GGCAL.Chronicle.Empty: No events recorded yet. Combats, rests and scene changes will appear here.
GGCAL.Settings.Chronicle.Name: Auto-chronicle session events
GGCAL.Settings.Chronicle.Hint: Automatically record combats, rests and scene changes with in-world timestamps, ready to compile into a session journal.
GGCAL.Region.climate.label: Climate
GGCAL.Region.rollWeatherOnEnter.label: Roll weather on enter
GGCAL.Region.particleEffect.label: Particle weather effect
GGCAL.Region.statusEffect.label: Status effect ID (optional)
GGCAL.Region.announce.label: Announce weather to chat
GGCAL.Region.FIELDS.climate.label: Climate
